query:
INSERT INTO cities (countryId, name, isActive) 
SELECT c.id, city.name, 1 
FROM countries c, (
  SELECT 'Riyadh' as name UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Jeddah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Makkah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Madinah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Dammam' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Dhahran' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Khobar'
) city
WHERE c.code = 'SA'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
